utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: destination is specified; travel_dates are specific; transportation includes flight type, route, and cost (though exact times/airline not required by format); accommodation includes hotel name, nights, per-night rate, and total cost; activities listed with individual costs and total; additional_services listed (though not costs, but format says 'any extra services with costs'—costs are not provided; however if services are free, costs could be zero but not stated; this may be considered incomplete); total_budget includes breakdown and total under limit. The only potentially incomplete item is additional_services lacking costs. Therefore 6 fully specified out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each selectable item in the final package and match it to the corresponding ground-truth entry. The package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation type (Budget Airlines Economy), accommodation (Eco Lodge), and activities (Hiking Expedition, City Walking Tour, Museum Day Pass, Photography tour). 'Photography tour' is not a listed activity in ground truth; the closest explicit match included in the package is 'City Walking Tour.' 'Local transport' and 'vegan restaurant guide' are not rateable items in the given ground truth. Map only items that appear both in the package and the ground-truth ratings.
